question: Which 5 customers spent the most?
reference_sql: SELECT FirstName || ' ' || LastName AS Customer, SUM(Total) AS TotalSpending FROM Customer JOIN Invoice USING (CustomerId) GROUP BY CustomerId ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the total invoice revenue by billing country?
reference_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS Revenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY Revenue DESC

question: How many tracks are in each genre?
reference_sql: SELECT Genre.Name AS Genre, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId ORDER BY TrackCount DESC

question: Which 5 artists have the most albums?
reference_sql: SELECT Artist.Name AS Artist, COUNT(Album.AlbumId) AS AlbumCount FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY AlbumCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which artist has the most tracks?
reference_sql: SELECT Artist.Name AS Artist, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average track duration in milliseconds by genre?
reference_sql: SELECT Genre.Name AS Genre, AVG(Track.Milliseconds) AS AverageMilliseconds FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId ORDER BY AverageMilliseconds DESC

question: How many invoices were issued in each year?
reference_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS Year, COUNT(*) AS InvoiceCount FROM Invoice GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Year

question: How many employees report to each manager?
reference_sql: SELECT Manager.FirstName || ' ' || Manager.LastName AS Manager, COUNT(Employee.EmployeeId) AS DirectReports FROM Employee JOIN Employee AS Manager ON Employee.ReportsTo = Manager.EmployeeId GROUP BY Manager.EmployeeId ORDER BY DirectReports DESC

question: Which playlists contain the most tracks?
reference_sql: SELECT Playlist.Name AS Playlist, COUNT(PlaylistTrack.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Playlist JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Playlist.PlaylistId = PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId GROUP BY Playlist.PlaylistId ORDER BY TrackCount DESC

question: How many tracks use each media type?
reference_sql: SELECT MediaType.Name AS MediaType, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM MediaType JOIN Track ON MediaType.MediaTypeId = Track.MediaTypeId GROUP BY MediaType.MediaTypeId ORDER BY TrackCount DESC

question: Which customer had the highest single invoice total?
reference_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName || ' ' || Customer.LastName AS Customer, Invoice.Total FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId ORDER BY Invoice.Total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total customer revenue for each support representative?
reference_sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName || ' ' || Employee.LastName AS Employee, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS Revenue FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Employee.EmployeeId = Customer.SupportRepId JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId ORDER BY Revenue DESC

question: List the 10 most expensive tracks with their artist names.
reference_sql: SELECT Track.Name AS Track, Artist.Name AS Artist, Track.UnitPrice FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY Track.UnitPrice DESC, Track.Name LIMIT 10

question: How many Rock tracks are available?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TrackCount FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'

question: How many customers do not have a company listed?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount FROM Customer WHERE Company IS NULL OR TRIM(Company) = ''
